title: 一般现在被动
prompt_en: Practice present simple passive: am/is/are + past participle.
prompt_zh: 练习一般现在被动语态。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 现在时 is done are made
ink_script_key: practice_course-passive_现在与过去_一般现在被动

title: 一般过去被动
prompt_en: Practice past simple passive: was/were + past participle.
prompt_zh: 练习一般过去被动语态。
description: 掌握was/were+过去分词结构和by短语。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 过去时 was built were created
ink_script_key: practice_course-passive_现在与过去_一般过去被动

title: 现在完成被动
prompt_en: Practice present perfect passive: have/has been + past participle.
prompt_zh: 练习现在完成被动语态。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 完成时 has been have been
ink_script_key: practice_course-passive_完成与将来_现在完成被动

title: 将来被动
prompt_en: Practice future passive: will be + past participle.
description: 掌握will be+过去分词和be going to be+过去分词。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 将来时 will be going to be

title: 情态被动
prompt_en: Practice modal passive: can/must/should be + past participle.
prompt_zh: 练习情态动词被动形式。
description: 掌握情态动词+be+过去分词结构。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 情态 can be must be should be

title: 常用被动表达
prompt_en: Practice common passive expressions: It is said that / is known as.
prompt_zh: 练习常用被动句型和固定表达。
knowledge_points: 被动语态 常用 it is said it is believed
ink_script_key: practice_course-passive_情态与常用_常用被动表达
